description: At the end of the winding forest path stands a small, crooked shack made of mismatched wood and old shoebox scraps. The door hangs slightly open. Whoever lives here has been alone for a very long time. This is where the rumors say the 'monster' Freddista dwells.

alt_descriptions.description: The crooked shack is quiet now. The dirt floor is still tidy, but the sense of loneliness has faded since Freddista left to join your adventure. Only the mismatching wooden walls remain as a reminder of her long exile.

wall.description: Rough wooden walls patched with bark and old laces. Whoever built this shack did the best they could with very little.

floor.description: A dirt floor covered with dried leaves. It's simple but surprisingly tidy.

edge_n.description: The forest path leads back north through the snake-infested trail.

item_lantern.description: A battered lantern hangs from a nail on the wall. It gives off a faint, warm glow — the only source of light in the shack.

onUse.failureMessage: The lantern illuminates the area, but there's nothing interesting to see there!

item_note.description: A crumpled note lies on the floor near the wall. It looks like it's been written and rewritten many times.

item.name: Freddista's Note
item.opened_description: The note reads: 'Day 4,382. Still alone. They say my stare kills. It doesn't. I'm staring at this note right now and it's fine. I just want someone to talk to.'

npc_freddista.description: A shoe stands in the middle of the shack. Her laces are frayed, her sole is torn, and she is covered with dirt and mud. Despite everything, her eyes are kind.

dialogue.text: "Oh my gosh! We have visitors!" The mysterious shoe introduces herself as Freddista. You look at her in shock. This is the terrifying monster everyone warned you about?

"You are Freddista?" you stammer, "I always thought of you as a giant terrifying monster." Freddista laughs. "I was exiled into this forest because people thought I wasn't fit for society. Then they started saying my stare kills. That isn't true — I'm staring at you right now."

"Someone stole my pasta and potatoes!" you screech. Freddista gives you a concerned look. "You came here just because of THAT? I have no idea who stole them, but you should check Breakfastopia. You never know what happens there." "Breakfastopia EXISTS?!" you exclaim.

"Can you please come with me?" you interrupt, now on your knees (if shoes had knees). "I guess I have nothing to do," grumbles Freddista. "Well, what are we waiting for? Grab that old lantern on the wall and let's head back to Shoeboxlandia!" Freddista has joined your party!
"Well, what are we waiting for? Let's head back through Shoeboxlandia and find your lunch. I hope the shoes there don't glare too much..." She pauses. "Actually, they will. Let's go anyway."
"I'm already in your party, Fred! Let's stay focused and find that lunch of yours. I've got my eye on the path ahead."
Freddista's eyes suddenly flare with an otherworldly intensity. "I told you... they say my stare kills. Do you want to see if they were right?" Everything goes dark.
